cluster_leverage.cluster_offer: Issue #211 Blackwell node — TRAIN A DRAFT

gate_a_kernel.binding_diagnostic: the cheap split-K microbench (#216's decisive diagnostic, ~1–2 days)
gate_a_kernel.reason: the batch-invariant fix is a split-K reduction-order change in the verify GEMM — draft-INDEPENDENT; a stronger draft changes E[T](λ), not the GEMM's reduction geometry
gate_a_kernel.what: build the batch-invariant int4 verify kernel near its 0.9455%-of-step split-K floor (band [0.95%, 31.41%]); the cheap split-K microbench settles it

gate_b_lambda.reason: a stronger Blackwell draft raises E[T](λ) at fixed λ and lifts the achievable λ, moving land #71 toward the 0.8572 threshold

synthesis.handoff_line: HAND-OFF (Issue #211 + fern #185): the valid-verify menu has collapsed to ONE survivor (lane-a int4 kernel, DOUBLE-gated on a near-floor kernel BUILD and land #71 λ ≥ 0.8572); the Blackwell cluster's draft-training helps only the λ gate, not the kernel build, so it unlocks 500 only if the kernel is also built near floor — authorize the cheap split-K microbench first (gate-a's decisive diagnostic), draft-training is conditional on it. Adds 0 TPS; imports ceilings/budget/divergence unchanged; authorizes nothing. NOT a launch.

honest_band.a_lane_a_floor_is_buildability_prior: lane-a's 0.9455%-of-step split-K floor is a buildability PRIOR (#216 scope-proportionality + split-K-penalty estimates), proven ONLY by the GPU split-K microbench — this leg does not certify it
honest_band.b_margingate_out_rests_on_demand_and_sup: the MarginGate-out verdict rests on #223's VERIFIED demand (sound skip ≥ 0.9706, needing < 3% full-verify) AND #114's model-free supply cap (≤ 0.4392 from the 56.08% flip). The supply cap's tightening leg is still open, but the DEMAND alone is already implausible
honest_band.c_ceilings_budget_et_imported_unchanged: the int4-spec λ=1 ceiling 520.953 (#204), the budget curve / λ_crit (#213), the fp16 ceiling (#220), the no-spec floor (#196), and E[T](λ) reach-DP (#175/#184) are IMPORTED unchanged; the two-ceiling note (reach-DP 536.66 vs #204 520.95 — both > 500) is carried
honest_band.d_lambda1_is_an_upper_bound: #199's rank-1 coverage 0.7304 over-counts the true compliant accept, so every λ=1 ceiling here is an UPPER bound; the verdict structure (1 survivor, double-gated) is robust to it

issue_211_verdict.binding_next_action_detail: authorize the cheap split-K microbench FIRST (#216's decisive gate-a diagnostic, ~1–2 days); it settles whether lane-a is buildable near floor. If gate-a fails, no draft-training — however strong — unlocks 500, since every other valid path NEVER clears.
issue_211_verdict.cluster_pays_off_iff: the int4 batch-invariant kernel is ALSO built near its 0.9455%-of-step floor (gate-a) — the cluster's draft-training lifts only the λ gate (gate-b)
issue_211_verdict.headline: CLUSTER_UNLOCKS_500_VIA_LANE_A_ONLY_IF_KERNEL_BUILT

nonworking_reference.note: whole-model determinism (#122, +51.78% step) — the WRONG kernel for the localized #192 bug; clears at NO physical λ≤1 (max budget at prob-saturation 50.10% < 51.78%). It is lane-a's whole-model foil, ~55× the verify-GEMM-only cost — NOT a 5th survivor.

valid_verify_menu.clears_500_basis: CLEARS at the 0.9455%-of-step split-K floor for λ ≥ 0.8572 (#216 over #213's budget; ∅ below — budget ≤ 0 under λ_crit=0.8345)
valid_verify_menu.gate_a_kernel_build: build the batch-invariant int4 verify kernel near its 0.9455%-of-step split-K floor (band [0.95%, 31.41%]); the cheap split-K microbench settles it
valid_verify_menu.validity_basis: split-K reduction-order fix makes the verify-M argmax identical to the AR-M=1 argmax ⇒ greedy-valid by construction (#192 strict-A)
valid_verify_menu.what_it_needs: DOUBLE-gated: (a) kernel BUILD near floor AND (b) land #71 λ ≥ 0.8572

valid_verify_menu.clears_500_basis: NEVER — draft-INDEPENDENT λ=1 cap 520.953/M_step is below 500 for all M_step ≥ 1.3 ≫ break-even 1.0419 (#220)
valid_verify_menu.lambda1_ceiling_note: = int4_ceiling/M_step = 520.953/1.7 at central M_step; < 500 for every physical M_step ≥ 1.3 (crossover 1.0419)
valid_verify_menu.validity_basis: batch-invariant cuBLAS GEMM (no M-dependent split-K) ⇒ AR-M=1 and verify-M argmax identical ⇒ greedy-valid by construction (imported #211 premise; lawine #221 confirms)
valid_verify_menu.what_it_needs: nothing buildable lifts it — at λ=1 E[T] saturates at the tree max regardless of draft quality, so no draft, however strong, raises the λ=1 ceiling above 500

valid_verify_menu.clears_500_basis: NEVER — needs SOUND skip ≥ 0.9706 to fit the λ=1 budget, but #114's 56.08% flip caps the sound skip at ≤ 0.4392 (provably-stable ⊆ non-flip); demand ≫ supply (#223)
valid_verify_menu.lambda1_ceiling_note: best case at the SOUND skip cap 0.4392: overhead 136.28% of step ⇒ 227.1 TPS
valid_verify_menu.validity_basis: a SOUND gate (margin > 2·ε_max) skips only provably-stable positions; the low-margin residual falls back to AR M=1 ⇒ greedy-valid (#192 strict-A)
valid_verify_menu.what_it_needs: a sound provable-stable skip ≥ 0.9706; the 0.5314-wide demand–supply gap is unclosable (needs < 3% full-verify vs ≥ 56.08% flips)

valid_verify_menu.clears_500_basis: NEVER — no-verify floor ≈ 165.4 official TPS, 66.9% below 500; structural (#196)
valid_verify_menu.validity_basis: plain int4 autoregressive greedy — no verify GEMM, no batch-width mismatch (token-identity rate 1.0, #196)
valid_verify_menu.what_it_needs: nothing — it is the compliant floor; the spec premium (≈316 TPS) is existential
